_comment: Local Inference Agent Template for Claw Pen
_description: Use this template to create agents that use local llama.cpp inference
_instructions: Copy this file, update the fields marked with TODO, and POST to /api/agents
name: local-llm-agent

env_vars._comment: Local inference uses host.docker.internal to reach llama.cpp on the host

_notes.preset: localinference - 4GB RAM, 2 CPU (optimized for 8B Q4 models)
_notes.image: openclaw-agent:local - Docker image without Tailscale dependency
_notes.PORT: Must be unique per agent, starts from 18790
_notes.OPENAI_BASE_URL: Points to llama.cpp server on host (port 8081)
